Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start loadwwpContext.Call(&Context) RetornaempresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, moduloSistema.PDV_M, &PDV_M) RetornaempresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, moduloSistema.DELIVERY, &DELIVERY) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PDV_M.Visible = False &DELIVERY.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Clientes' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'CheckSecurityForActions' Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwClienteContaReceberColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwClienteContaReceberColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf PesCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &gridPesRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &gridPesFan.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &CpfCnpj.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PesCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible PesPrmFon.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible PesUltVenDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &UpdatePessoa.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' PesCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm' &gridPesRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridPesFan.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &CpfCnpj.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' PesCidNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' PesPrmFon.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' PesUltVenDta.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VisualizarConta.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &Imprimir.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &accc.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &IsExisteVencida = RetornaIsExisteDuplicataVencida.Udp(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod) &UpdatePessoa.Link = wpPessoa.Link('WWCLIENTE', 'UPD', EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UpdatePessoa = !'' &VisualizarConta = !'' &Imprimir = !'' &accc.Clear() &accc.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &accc.AddItem(1, 'Historico Cliente') PesCidNom.Link = ViewCidade.Link(EmpCod, PesCidCod, '') &gridPesRaz = iif(PesRaz.Length() > 25, Substr(PesRaz,1, 25) + '...', PesRaz) &gridPesFan = iif(PesFan.Length() > 25, Substr(PesFan,1, 25) + '...', PesFan) If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF If &IsExisteVencida = true &UpdatePessoa.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerFirstColumn' PesCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger hidden-xs hidden-sm' &gridPesRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger' &gridPesFan.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger' &CpfCnpj.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger' PesCidNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger hidden-xs' PesPrmFon.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger' PesUltVenDta.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger' &VisualizarConta.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnDanger' &Imprimir.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnDanger' &accc.ColumnClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnDanger' Else &UpdatePessoa.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' PesCod.ColumnClass = iif(PesSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO, !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm') &gridPesRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridPesFan.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &CpfCnpj.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' PesCidNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' PesPrmFon.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' PesUltVenDta.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VisualizarConta.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &Imprimir.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &accc.ColumnClass = 'WWActionGroupColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &SomenteVencidas = true and &IsExisteVencida = true Load Case &SomenteVencidas = False Load EndCase EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwClienteContaReceberColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &accc.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &accc = 1 Do 'Do Historico' EndCase &accc = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraDelivery' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wwMonitoraDelivery.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVoltaPdv' 7 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ pdv_m.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSaldo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoDebito_clientes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WpConsultaDebitos.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCod", '', !'Código', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesRaz", '', !'Razão Social', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesFan", '', !'Fantasia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CpfCnpj", '', !'Cpf/Cnpj', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCidNom", '', !'Cidade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesPrmFon", '', !'Fone', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesUltVenDta", '', !'Ult.Compra', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwClienteContaReceberColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CheckSecurityForActions' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not (&DELIVERY = 'S') BtnMonitoraDelivery.Visible = False Endif If not (&PDV_M = 'S') BtnVoltaPdv.Visible = False Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &RatNom1.Visible = False &PesCidCod1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesFan1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &RatNom2.Visible = False &PesCidCod2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesFan2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &RatNom3.Visible = False &PesCidCod3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesFan3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Historico' wwhistoricoCliente.Link(PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTROPESRAZ", "", not &FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiltroPesRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta1.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta2.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta3.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Cliente" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &SomenteVencidas.ControlValueChanged Refresh keep EndEvent Event &Imprimir.Click // &PedCliCod = 0 // RetornaCodigoPEssoaSugestNome.Call(&EmpCod, &CreCliCodRazSugg, &PedCliCod) // if &PedCliCod.IsEmpty() // &random = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) // &webSession.Set(&random, 'S') // // wpinformaClienteListagem.Popup(&EmpCod, &random) // Else wpImpressaoRecibo.Popup('', '1', '', &Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, 0, PesCod) // Endif EndEvent Event &VisualizarConta.Click padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'SEL_WWDuplicataReceber', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwduplicatareceber2.Link(PesCod) EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
